data.title: Binance adjusts negative margin balance threshold for portfolio
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will implement a tiered negative balance threshold mechanism for portfolio margin accounts starting at 0:00 (UTC) on May 17, 2025. The higher the VIP level, the higher the negative balance threshold that can be held. If the negative balance of the account exceeds the corresponding threshold, the system will charge interest fees at 0:00 (UTC) every day according to the margin lending daily interest rate. Negative balances are only allowed when the unified maintenance margin rate (uniMMR) is higher than the 105% liquidation line, and interest will affect the uniMMR value. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Gate.io releases new reserve report, with total reserve value reaching US$10.865 billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io released a new reserve report. As of May 8, the total value of Gate.io reserves reached 10.865 billion US dollars, the total reserve rate reached 128.57%, and the excess reserve value was 2.415 billion US dollars.
In addition, the BTC reserve rate was 137.69%, an increase of 2,802 pieces from the previous period, the ETH reserve rate was 121.36%, an increase of 188,563 pieces from the previous period, and the USDT reserve rate was 102.63%, an increase of 441,334,786 pieces from the previous period.

data.title: Senate Halts Stablecoin Bill Over Trump Crypto Controversy
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, May 09, 2025-The US Senate voted Thursday to stall progress on a bipartisan bill aimed at regulating stablecoins, as tensions flared over former President Donald Trump’s deepening involvement in cryptocurrency ventures. The bill remains in limbo as lawmakers continue closed-door negotiations. Senators voted in a procedural cloture move that effectively paused the bill. […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/senate-halts-stablecoin-bill-over-trump-crypto-controversy

data.title: Wellgistics Integrates XRP in $50M Push for Faster, Smarter Payments
data.description:
S. -listed pharma infrastructure firm Wellgistics is integrating XRP for both payments and reserves, backed by a $50 million credit facility. The move is aimed at improving cross-border settlement speed, cutting banking delays, and exploring on-demand payments and programmable liquidity
source: https://coinpedia.org/crypto-live-news/wellgistics-integrates-xrp-in-50m-push-for-faster-smarter-payments/

data.title: Ripple CEO warns of US falling behind without stablecoin regulation
data.description:
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse has called on US lawmakers to accelerate efforts to establish a clear regulatory framework for stablecoins. In a May 9 statement shared on social media platform X (formerly Twitter), he emphasized the growing global adoption of stablecoins and warned that the US risks losing its competitive edge without urgent action.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/ripple-ceo-warns-of-us-falling-behind-without-stablecoin-regulation/

data.title: Bitget and SWEAT reached a strategic cooperation to jointly promote the new paradigm of Web3 sports economy
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget and SWEAT have reached a strategic partnership, aiming to jointly lower the threshold for Web2 users to enter Web3 and open up the connection path between virtual and reality. This cooperation was officially unveiled at the Dubai Esports Festival (DEF) in 2025. The event site demonstrated the innovative model of "earning crypto rewards while exercising" through fun interactive experiences. From Dubai Airport to Sheikh Zayed Road, city landmark advertisements convey the vision of cooperation with the slogan "Walk into Crypto—Step. Sweat. Score." 
SWEAT co-founder and CEO Oleg Fomenko said: "We are transforming daily exercise into a new path of financial empowerment. This is not only a digital incentive for basic life behaviors, but also a deep reshaping of the way digital assets are owned."

data.title: ZachXBT: Instant market eXch had $38M and infrastructure seized by law enforcement
data.description:
The eXch market operator had its servers and crypto wallets seized by German authorities. The market operator was used to launder funds from multiple exploits, and refused to cooperate with Bybit for asset recovery.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/zachxbt-exch-38m-seized-law-enforcement/
